allow: Bash(go run . config set backup_expiry 3mo && go run . config get backup_expiry)
Bash(git add README.md .github .gitignore .goreleaser.yaml cmd docs go.mod go.sum install.sh internal main.go)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add full shync implementation with guided Google Drive setup

- Add all CLI commands: init, up, down, list, add, remove, auth, config,
  update, uninstall, clean, version
- Add Google Drive and Synology NAS storage backends
- Add guided step-by-step Google Cloud Console instructions during
  shync init \(using new Google Auth Platform URLs\)
- Trigger OAuth browser flow automatically after init for Google Drive
- Replace yes/no text prompts with interactive promptui pickers
- Display $HOME instead of absolute paths in setup instructions
- Add note about "Google hasn't verified this app" warning
- Rename Go module from github.com/quangkhai/shync to
  github.com/quangkhaidam93/shync to match actual GitHub repo
- Update README with Google Drive setup guide, installation methods,
  command reference, and backend documentation
- Add CI/CD workflows, GoReleaser config, and install script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/gh auth token | /opt/homebrew/bin/gh secret set HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN --repo quangkhaidam93/shync)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add check, diff, and view commands and update README

- shync check: compare local/remote file contents to show sync status
- shync diff: side-by-side diff with line numbers \(local cyan, remote blue\)
- shync view: open tracked files in read-only vim \(local or remote\)
- Update README commands table with all available commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add GitHub Gist backend, rename up/down to push/pull, add supported command

Add GitHub Gist as a lightweight storage backend using Personal Access
Tokens. Files are stored in a single private gist, with no new
dependencies \(stdlib net/http + encoding/json only\).

Rename commands: up -> push, down -> pull for clarity. Add `shync
supported` subcommand \(list/add/remove\) for managing supported file
patterns. Add naming conflict resolution for multi-device sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
